endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts
endpoints.description: List all the ExpressRoutePort resources in the specified subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePortsLocations
endpoints.description: Retrieves all ExpressRoutePort peering locations. Does not return available bandwidths for each location. Available bandwidths can only be obtained when retrieving a specific peering location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePortsLocations/{locationName}
endpoints.description: Retrieves a single ExpressRoutePort peering location, including the list of available bandwidths available at said peering location.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LOCATIONNAME}} with a real locationname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts
endpoints.description: List all the ExpressRoutePort resources in the specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts/{expressRoutePortName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEPORTNAME}} with a real expressrouteportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts/{expressRoutePortName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates the specified ExpressRoutePort resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEPORTNAME}} with a real expressrouteportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts/{expressRoutePortName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEPORTNAME}} with a real expressrouteportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: PATCH /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts/{expressRoutePortName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEPORTNAME}} with a real expressrouteportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts/{expressRoutePortName}/links
endpoints.description: Retrieve the ExpressRouteLink sub-resources of the specified ExpressRoutePort resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEPORTNAME}} with a real expressrouteportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/ExpressRoutePorts/{expressRoutePortName}/links/{linkName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{LINKNAME}} with a real linkname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEPORTNAME}} with a real expressrouteportname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
